paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is currently 6.03, with a 1.69% increase from the prior close and a 30.37% decrease over the last 21 sessions. There have been 3 new news articles in the last 24 hours.

Recent news headlines include discussions of a director's exit over governance concerns and a $375 million convertibles deal, as well as questions about whether the stock is above fair value after a note offering. The news sources include simplywall.st and Yahoo Finance, with articles dated July 16 and 17, 2026.

There have been various SEC filings recently, including an 8-K form on July 15, 2026, regarding the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031, and another 8-K form on July 13, 2026, disclosing the resignation of director Miles Everson due to a disagreement over access to company books and records. Additionally, there has been 1 Form 4 filing, with no Form 144 filings.
